goal_summary: The patient wanted an urgent refill for lisinopril but did not receive confirmation of the refill.

bugs_found.evidence: I can't proceed further right now, but
I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you. Please hold while I
bugs_found.new_title: Agent fails to provide a timeline for follow-up

summary: The patient, James Okafor, called to request an urgent refill for lisinopril but was not able to complete the request due to the agent's inability to proceed without a phone number. The agent incorrectly routed the call to an orthopedic clinic and deferred the issue to a support team without providing a timeline for follow-up.
